bregman_zero_certified_explanation: dominant stage=validate_simplex: groups are structurally INCOMPLETE (exhaustive=False / not a provable complete set) — buying a partial set is not a guaranteed hedge, so it is correctly NOT certified (completeness is never fabricated); NOTE: 110 group(s) had POSITIVE raw projected profit (best=0.999) but were still rejected (realism=5, validate_simplex=105) — the raw mispricing is real, but the set is not a certifiable complete hedge
